headline: NYSE Owner and OKX Seek to Launch Perpetual Futures Tied to Oil
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intercontinental Exchange Inc., owner of the New York Stock Exchange, is working with crypto exchange operator OKX to launch oil futures contracts that never expire. headline: CME (CME) Up 1.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: CME (CME) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: House Panel to Probe Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The House Oversight Committee is investigating how customers of Kalshi and Polymarket could be using non-public information to engage in insider trading, escalating concerns about prediction markets after some suspiciously well timed trades. headline: Nasdaq Gets Approval From SEC to List Bitcoin Index Options
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Securities and Exchange Commission has given the go-ahead for Nasdaq Inc. to list index options based on the price of Bitcoin, the latest sign that Wall Street is becoming more tightly integrated with the world of digital assets.
